RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion for Order Granting Preference in Setting Case for Trial, and Extending Discovery Cutoff is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. sections 36(a) and 36(d). Conditional opposition filed by Honeywell International Inc. and Metalclad Insulation LLC. Opposition filed by Caterpillar Inc. Opposition filed by Pneumo Abex LLC. Opposition filed by FMC Corporation and joined by American Optical Corporation. The trial date is May 22, 2023 at 11:15a.m. in Department 503. Last day pursuant to C.C.P. section 36(f) is June 23, 2023. Local Rule 20 shall be followed by the parties as well as all San Francisco Local Rules and California Rules of Court.
The last day for hearing summary judgment/adjudication motions is May 18, 2023. Summary judgment/adjudication motions shall be brought on regular notice pursuant to the relevant provisions of the C.C.P., unless the parties stipulate otherwise. The Court will allow a maximum of four summary judgment/adjudication motions per day to be calendared in this action. Before a party files and serves such motion, it must contact the Court's Calendar Clerk to make a reservation. Time to respond to written discovery that has not yet been served is shortened to 20 days. For written discovery that has already been served, responses are due within 20 days of this hearing or by the date determined by the C.C.P., whichever is earlier. If there is any kind of issue/dispute that requires meet and confer, such meet and confer shall not be made via email or letter. It shall occur in person or via telephone. Electronic service is considered the equivalent of personal service. Fact discovery cut-off date is May 5, 2023. Expert discovery cut-off date is May 19, 2023.
